name: Pipeline Fixer — Pre-Push Validation
description: Intercepts file push operations to enforce branch protection and log all write operations for audit compliance.

rules.description: Block direct pushes to protected branches in auto-fix mode. Force fix-branch creation instead.
rules.message: 🛑 Auto-fix push blocked: branch '{branch}' is protected. The orchestrator should create a fix branch (fix/ci-{pipeline_id}) instead. Falling back to Fix mode.

rules.description: Warn when pushing to any branch not matching the fix/ci-* convention.
rules.message: ⚠️ Push target '{branch}' does not match the fix/ci-* convention. Ensure this is intentional.

rules.description: Log every push attempt for audit trail.
